channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Toronto Condo Market Shows Signs of Recovery After Price Drop
item.description: After a prolonged period of declining sales and cancelled projects, Toronto's condominium market is showing early signs of recovery. Following a roughly 25 per cent drop in condo prices since their 20...

item.title: Man Discovers False SHA Medical Records Indicating Treatment He Didn’t Receive
item.description: Obed Oruki, a travel consultant based in Nairobi, was shocked to find that his Social Health Authority (SHA) records showed treatment for a urinary tract infection (UTI) in Garissa, even though he was...

item.title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay pledges transparent governance, women’s safety, and anti-corruption measures
item.description: C Joseph Vijay, the leader of Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), officially assumed office as the Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu on Sunday. Delivering his first address after taking the oath at Jawaharlal ...

item.title: Tropical Depression Caloy Weakens, Minimal Impact Expected in PH
item.description: Tropical Depression Caloy, locally known as Hagupit, has weakened from a tropical storm into a tropical depression as of the morning of May 10, 2026, over the Philippine Sea. PAGASA reported that its ...

item.title: CDF Munir Emphasises Strong Deterrence Against Future Threats
item.description: Chief of Defence Forces and Army Chief Field Marshal Asim Munir addressed a ceremony at GHQ Rawalpindi marking one year since Pakistan's success in last year’s conflict with India, referred to as 'Mar...

item.title: North Korea Amends Constitution to Allow Automatic Nuclear Retaliation in Case of Leader’s Death
item.description: North Korea has amended its constitution to mandate an automatic nuclear strike if its leader, Kim Jong Un, is assassinated or incapacitated. The constitutional update was reportedly approved during a...

item.title: Wife Struggles with Fidelity as Long-Distance Marriage Tests Boundaries
item.description: The advice column discusses a married woman named Danica who is facing a difficult emotional and relational dilemma. She has been married to her husband Danny for two years, after previously living a ...

item.title: One Nation secures victory in Farrer by-election as Liberals face challenge from rising right-wing populism
item.description: In a significant shift in Australian politics, One Nation has won the Farrer by-election, delivering a major blow to the Liberals in what was previously Sussan Ley’s seat. The result highlights a broa...

item.title: Passengers evacuated from hantavirus-struck cruise ship as ship docks in Tenerife
item.description: The Dutch-flagged MV Hondius, carrying over 140 passengers and crew, is set to dock in Tenerife following a hantavirus outbreak on board. Twenty-two British citizens, including 19 passengers and three...

item.title: Unauthorised traveller site in Essex listed for sale on Facebook
item.description: A four-acre field in Willows Green, Essex, has been the centre of controversy after it was reportedly concreted over and listed for sale on Facebook. The site, which contains 12 plots, was advertised ...

item.title: Vijay Sworn In as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Following TVK Majority Win in 2026 Assembly Elections
item.description: Due to restricted access to the NDTV website, the full news article could not be retrieved. Based on the headline and available information, it is reported that Vijay has been sworn in as the new Chie...

item.title: Vice President Sara Duterte's Team to Monitor House Impeachment Proceedings from Afar
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte will not attend the House of Representatives plenary session on Monday regarding her impeachment case. According to her defense team's spokesperson, lawyer Michael Poa, the...

item.title: Five pedestrians injured in suspected deliberate car incident in Nottinghamshire town centre
item.description: A serious incident in Arnold, Nottinghamshire, has left five pedestrians injured after a car drove into a group of people in the town centre during the early hours of Saturday morning. Emergency servi...

item.title: Trump Faces Geopolitical Challenges Ahead of Beijing Summit with Xi
item.description: Donald Trump is set to visit Beijing for a two-day summit with President Xi Jinping amid escalating international tensions. The US president is seeking Chinese cooperation to manage the ongoing confli...

item.title: CBC docuseries follows Winnipeg couple rescuing dogs in rural communities
item.description: The CBC docuseries Must Love Dogs follows Winnipeg couple Brady Oliveira and Alex Blumberg as they work to rescue stray dogs in rural Manitoba, particularly in First Nation communities facing overpopu...

item.title: Sonam Kapoor and Anand Ahuja announce their second son’s name and its spiritual significance
item.description: Bollywood actress Sonam Kapoor and her husband, businessman Anand Ahuja, have announced the name of their second son, Rudralokh Kapoor Ahuja, sharing the news through a joint social media post. The co...

item.title: Toronto FC hosts Inter Miami as upgraded BMO Field debuts ahead of World Cup preparations
item.description: Toronto FC hosted Inter Miami at a newly upgraded BMO Field in a match that served as a key test event ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The game marked one of the first opportunities to showcase the ...

item.title: Kingsley Chinda Appears Before APC Screening Panel Ahead of Rivers Governorship Race
item.description: The Minority Leader of the House of Representatives, Kingsley Chinda, don waka go APC screening committee as e dey try contest for Rivers State governorship 2027. Chinda wey dey represent Obio/Akpor F...

item.title: The rise of testosterone therapy and concerns over overdiagnosis in men
item.description: Over recent years, there has been a surge in men being diagnosed with low testosterone, driven in part by private health companies, social media influencers, and celebrity endorsements. The condition,...

item.title: PM Modi Congratulates Vijay on Swearing-in as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi extended his congratulations to Thiru C. Joseph Vijay upon his swearing-in as the Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu on Sunday. Modi assured that the Central Government would co...
